---
name: sit-test
description: Use when planning or executing system integration tests, API workflows, cross-component verification, Next.js to Python flows, failure recovery checks, or end-to-end evidence collection.
---

# SIT Test

Use this skill when validation depends on more than one component working together.

Cover:

- primary user workflows
- integration boundaries
- external dependencies
- failure and recovery paths
- data flow from input to observable output
- browser or route-handler to Python API or job boundary checks when the stack spans both ecosystems

Record the evidence in `testing-report.md` rather than leaving it only in command output.
